underlying_goal: Deliberate and design the architecture for Phase 38.1 (project-local knowledge base migration), making thoughtful decisions about KB structure, lessons vs signals, cross-project sharing, and scoping
friction_detail: Claude misused AskUserQuestion tool repeatedly with empty responses, and initially rushed through the deliberation without sufficient thought, requiring user to redirect multiple times.
brief_summary: User wanted to deeply deliberate Phase 38.1 KB architecture decisions; after initial friction with tooling and rushed analysis, Claude helped refine the design (deprecating lessons, scoping must/should/could) and produced updated CONTEXT.md and deliberation docs.
